## Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature idea. -->

## Problem Statement
<!-- Describe the problem this feature solves. What problem do you encounter without it? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the ideal solution or implementation. -->

## Alternative Approaches
<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered. -->

## Use Cases
<!-- Explain how this feature would be used. Provide concrete examples. -->

## Example Implementation
<!-- If applicable, provide code snippets or pseudocode showing how this might work. -->
```python
# Example code here
```

## Additional Context
<!-- Any other context, sketches, or references. -->

## Is this related to an existing issue?
<!-- Link any related issues here. -->

---

**Checklist:**
- [ ] I have searched existing feature requests
- [ ] The feature aligns with the project scope
- [ ] I've provided clear use cases
- [ ] This would benefit multiple users
